message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Consumer Survey Finland 1962","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1471","justification":"Contains survey data on consumer opinions and expectations in Finland in 1962, including assessments of personal and national economic conditions and spending intentions."},{"title":"Consumer Survey Finland 1963","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1472","justification":"Follow‑up consumer survey for Finland in 1963 with indicators such as perceptions of the economic situation, financial expectations, and planned major purchases."},{"title":"Consumer Survey Finland 1964","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1473","justification":"Provides 1964 Finnish consumer sentiment and expectations that serve as indicators for economic conditions, including income expectations and evaluations of the national economy."},{"title":"Consumer Survey Finland 1965","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1474","justification":"Includes Finnish household assessments of current and future economic situation, capturing indicators such as perceived inflation, savings, and expenditure plans in 1965."},{"title":"Consumer Survey Finland 1966","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1475","justification":"Offers 1966 data on consumer confidence and expectations in Finland, which are widely used as indicators of short‑term economic developments."},{"title":"Consumer Survey Finland 1967","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1476","justification":"Covers Finnish consumers’ views of the national economy, household finances, and purchasing plans in 1967, suitable for analyzing economic climate and indicators."},{"title":"Consumer Survey Finland 1968","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1477","justification":"Provides 1968 Finnish consumer opinions on prices, income, savings, and overall economic prospects, which act as soft indicators of economic conditions."},{"title":"Consumer Survey Finland 1969","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1478","justification":"Contains 1969 Finnish consumer expectations and evaluations of the economic situation, including major‑purchase intentions, helpful for tracking late‑1960s conditions."},{"title":"Growth to Limits: The Western European Welfare States Since World War II, Volume 3 – Finland, Norway, Sweden, Denmark (GESIS data edition)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.5504","justification":"Historical dataset on welfare state development including Finland, with macro‑economic indicators (expenditure, social policy, and related economic data) spanning the postwar decades including the 1960s."},{"title":"International Social Survey Programme (ISSP) – Role of Government I (1985) with Historical Macro Indicators (GESIS edition)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12253","justification":"Though the survey year is later, the GESIS macro‑data appendix includes historical economic indicators for participating countries, including Finland, with time‑series reaching back to the 1960s (e.g., GDP, unemployment, public expenditure)."}]}
